---
name: keyboard-first-ui
description: Design StockRipper observer workflows, dashboards, and CLI controls for fast keyboard-friendly monitoring of the autonomous multi-track system.
---

# Keyboard-First Workflow Skill

## When to Use

- Improving observer flow in the CLI, dashboard, or reports
- Making the track leaderboard, per-track detail, and operational health fast to scan
- Reducing friction during emergency overrides (kill switch, per-track pause/resume) and reconciliation incidents

## Key Rules

1. Put the most common observer actions (switching tracks, opening leaderboard, viewing recent decisions, triggering kill / pause) within easy keyboard reach.
2. Keep focus and navigation predictable across the workflow.
3. Use short, clear labels and avoid hidden commands.
4. Do not introduce keyboard shortcuts that imply a per-order approval flow. The system is autonomous; the only operator controls are observation, kill switch, and per-track pause/resume.
5. Make destructive emergency controls (kill, pause) require an explicit confirmation step so they cannot be triggered by a stray keystroke.
